channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NXTDIGITAL] NDL Ventures Board to meet on April 21 for FY26 results & dividend
item.description:
NDL Ventures Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for Tuesday, April 21, 2026. The primary agenda includes considering and approving the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will consider recommending a dividend on the equity shares of the Company for the financial year 2025-26, if any. The trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 21, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Audited Financial Results for FY26.
  • Board to recommend dividend for FY 2025-26, if any.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nxtdigital Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VIKRAN] Vikran Engineering Board appoints auditor, nodal officers; pays ₹4,720 NSE penalty
item.description:
Vikran Engineering Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting on April 16, 2026, approved the appointment of RSM Astute Consulting Private Limited as the Internal Auditor for the period from January 1, 2026, to March 31, 2029. The Board also appointed Ms. Kajal Rakholiya as Nodal Officer and Ms. Preeti Deshmukh as Deputy Nodal Officer, both effective April 16, 2026, for Investor Education and Protection Fund Authority coordination. Additionally, the Board noted and paid a ₹4,720 penalty levied by NSE for a two-day delay in disclosing a shareholding pattern, attributing the delay to an inadvertent error and committing to strengthen internal compliance.

  • RSM Astute Consulting appointed as Internal Auditor until March 2029.
  • Ms. Kajal Rakholiya appointed Nodal Officer for IEPF coordination.
  • Ms. Preeti Deshmukh appointed Deputy Nodal Officer.
  • Company paid ₹4,720 NSE penalty for shareholding pattern disclosure delay.
  • Measures implemented to strengthen internal compliance mechanisms.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vikran Engineering Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [PAEL] PAE Board Meeting Adjourned to April 23 for Q4 Results, Dividend, Bonus Issue
item.description:
PAE Ltd announced the adjournment of its Board of Directors meeting, originally scheduled for April 16, 2026, to April 23, 2026. The postponement is due to unavoidable circumstances. The agenda for the rescheduled meeting includes considering and approving the standalone audited financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a final dividend for the financial year 2025-26 and a proposal for issuing bonus shares to public shareholders to comply with Minimum Public Shareholding requirements.

  • PAE Ltd's board meeting postponed from April 16 to April 23, 2026.
  • Meeting agenda includes Q4/FY26 financial results approval.
  • Board to consider final dividend recommendation for FY26.
  • Proposal for bonus share issue to meet public shareholding norms.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PAE LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ALTIUSINVIT] Altius Telecom Infra Trust Q4 FY26 Unitholding Pattern Disclosed
item.description:
Altius Telecom Infrastructure Trust has disclosed its unitholding pattern for Q4 FY2025-26 as of March 31, 2026, in compliance with SEBI InvIT Regulations. The total units outstanding are 3,04,74,00,000. The Sponsor & Sponsor Group holds 1,79,42,00,000 units, representing 58.88% of the total. Public holding accounts for 1,25,32,00,000 units, or 41.12%. Notably, 27,50,00,000 units held by the Sponsor are under lock-in, and no units held by the Sponsor have been pledged.

  • Total units outstanding for Altius Telecom Infra Trust are 3,04,74,00,000.
  • Sponsor and Sponsor Group hold 58.88% of the total units.
  • Public holding constitutes 41.12% of the total units.
  • 27,50,00,000 Sponsor units are under lock-in as per SEBI InvIT Regulations.
  • Sponsor has not pledged any of its held units.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Altius Telecom Infrastructure Trust | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [ANUROOP] Anuroop Packaging Forfeits ₹1.235 Cr Warrants from Promoters
item.description:
Anuroop Packaging Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 16, 2026, approved the forfeiture of certain preferential warrants. These warrants, issued to both promoter and non-promoter categories, remained unexercised within the stipulated 18-month period. According to SEBI ICDR Regulations, warrant holders failed to pay the balance consideration after the initial 25% upfront payment. The forfeiture means there will be no change in the company's paid-up share capital, and potential equity dilution is reduced. The forfeited upfront amount of ₹1.235 crore will be retained by the company and credited to its Capital Reserve. Additionally, the concerned promoter(s)/promoter group entities, to the extent of forfeited warrants, are restricted from participating in any preferential issue of specified securities of the Company for one year.

  • Board approved forfeiture of unexercised preferential warrants.
  • Total ₹1.235 Cr upfront amount forfeited by the company.
  • No change in paid-up share capital; potential equity dilution reduced.
  • Forfeited amount to be credited to the company's Capital Reserve.
  • Affected parties restricted from future preferential issues for one year.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Anuroop Packaging Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [PAEL] PAE Board to meet Apr 23 for FY26 Results, Dividend, Bonus Issue
item.description:
PAE Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors meeting, originally scheduled for April 16, 2026, has been adjourned to April 23, 2026, due to unavoidable circumstances. The board will convene to consider and approve the Standalone Audited Financial Results for the fourth quarter and full financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the agenda includes considering and recommending a final dividend for FY26 and evaluating a proposal for issuing bonus shares to public shareholders to comply with Minimum Public Shareholding requirements.

  • Board meeting rescheduled to April 23, 2026.
  • To consider Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Proposal for final dividend for FY26 to be discussed.
  • Bonus share issue for MPS compliance on agenda.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PAE LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PTC] PTC India appoints Sukhdev Singh as Non-Executive Chairman
item.description:
PTC India Ltd has announced the appointment of Sh. Sukhdev Singh, an existing Independent Director, as the Non-Executive Chairman of the Company. This decision, made by the Board on April 16, 2026, follows an earlier intimation on February 14, 2026, regarding the bifurcation of the combined Chairman & Managing Director role into two distinct positions. Sh. Singh's appointment is effective from the date of receipt of consent from the CMDs of all four promoter companies and will continue until the completion of his existing tenure as an Independent Director, i.e., up to November 10, 2028. Sh. Sukhdev Singh is a retired 1987-batch IAS officer with 37 years of administrative experience, including serving as Chief Secretary of Jharkhand.

  • PTC India appoints Sh. Sukhdev Singh as Non-Executive Chairman.
  • Appointment follows bifurcation of Chairman & Managing Director roles.
  • Effective upon consent from promoter companies' CMDs.
  • Tenure as Chairman is until November 10, 2028.
  • Sh. Singh is a retired IAS officer with extensive experience.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PTC INDIA LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [YUG] Yug Decor clarifies scrip price movement is market-driven
item.description:
Yug Decor Ltd. responded to a clarification request regarding the movement in its scrip's price. The company affirmed that all necessary price-sensitive information has been disclosed in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Yug Decor stated that, in its opinion, there are no impending announcements that could impact the scrip's price. Consequently, the company attributes the price and volume movement to market forces, over which it has no control. Yug Decor reiterated its commitment to timely dissemination of any future price-sensitive information and adherence to all applicable Listing Regulations.

  • Company clarifies scrip price movement.
  • No undisclosed price-sensitive information exists.
  • Price/volume movement is purely market-driven.
  • Company adheres to SEBI Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Yug Decor Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [VSTIND] VST Industries FY26 PAT 290.4 Cr; Recommends 12 Dividend
item.description:
VST Industries Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. For the full year FY26, the company reported a Profit After Tax (PAT) of 290.40 Crores ( 29040 Lakhs) and Total Revenue from Operations of 2045.74 Crores ( 204574 Lakhs). The Board also recommended a final dividend of 12 per equity share of 10 each. This dividend, if approved by shareholders at the 95th Annual General Meeting, will be paid within 30 days of approval. The company noted that amendments in indirect taxes from February 1, 2026, impact the comparability of Gross Sales and Excise duty figures for the period.

  • VST Industries reported FY26 Profit After Tax of 290.40 Crores.
  • Total Revenue from Operations for FY26 stood at 2045.74 Crores.
  • Board recommended a final dividend of 12 per equity share.
  • Dividend payment is subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.
  • Tax amendments from Feb 2026 impact comparability of sales and excise duty.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VST INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [DEVX] Dev Accelerator: VP Operations Monika Handa resigns
item.description:
Dev Accelerator Ltd announced the resignation of Ms. Monika Handa, Vice President Operations and Facility, designated as Senior Management Personnel. Her resignation letter was dated April 11, 2026, and accepted by the company's management on April 16, 2026. Ms. Handa will be relieved from her duties effective from the close of business hours on April 30, 2026. She cited the reason for her departure as pursuing new challenges and opportunities aligned with her long-term career goals and aspirations. She also committed to ensuring a smooth transition of her responsibilities.

  • Ms. Monika Handa, VP Operations, has resigned from Dev Accelerator.
  • Her last working day will be April 30, 2026.
  • The resignation is to pursue new career opportunities.
  • The company has accepted her resignation.
  • She will ensure a smooth transition of her responsibilities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dev Accelerator Ltd | Category: Management Change
